## Upstream Integrity

Diff-of-diffs: compares old fork patches vs new fork patches.

### 🔴 Added Patches (10)

New upstream modifications not present on the old fork:

| File | Status | Summary |
|------|--------|---------|
| `include/core/SkBitmap.h` | ✅ PASS | Changes getSubset() return type from SkIRect to SkRect. Intentional API type system evolution in upstream m122. |
| `modules/skottie/src/text/TextShaper.cpp` | ✅ PASS | Adds SKOTTIE_TRIVIAL_FONTRUN_ITER conditional for Chrome Linux/CrOS crash workaround (crbug.com/1520148). Known upstream fix. |
| `src/gpu/ganesh/ops/DashOp.cpp` | ✅ PASS | Adds SkSafeMath overflow checks for totalRectCount calculations. Security hardening for large input values. |
| `src/gpu/ganesh/ops/DrawAtlasOp.cpp` | ✅ PASS | Adds SkSafeMath overflow checks when combining quad counts. Returns kCannotCombine on overflow. Defensive programming. |
| `src/gpu/ganesh/ops/GrMeshDrawOp.cpp` | ✅ PASS | Adds overflow check in PatternHelper::init() for vertexCount calculation. Prevents integer overflow with negative or large repeatCount. |
| `src/gpu/ganesh/ops/LatticeOp.cpp` | ✅ PASS | Adds SkSafeMath overflow checks for numRects accumulation. Consistent with safety patterns in other GPU ops. |
| `src/gpu/ganesh/ops/RegionOp.cpp` | ✅ PASS | Adds SkSafeMath overflow checks for numRects in region complexity loop. Follows established safety pattern across GPU ops. |
| `src/sksl/codegen/SkSLRasterPipelineBuilder.cpp` | ✅ PASS | Changes allocateSlotData() to return std::optional for overflow detection. Adds SkSafeMath and SkTFitsIn checks. |
| `src/sksl/codegen/SkSLRasterPipelineBuilder.h` | ✅ PASS | Updates allocateSlotData() signature to return std::optional. Header change matching implementation for overflow handling. |
| `src/utils/SkCustomTypeface.cpp` | ✅ PASS | Adds fAllowSkSL=false to SkDrawable::Deserialize() procs. Security hardening preventing SkSL code injection during deserialization. |

### 🟡 Removed Patches (11)

Patches from the old fork that are no longer present:

| File | Status | Summary |
|------|--------|---------|
| `gn/skia/BUILD.gn` | ✅ PASS | Build system patches for iOS/tvOS SDK, WinRT, visibility flags, and PIC mode. Upstream modernized build config, patches no longer needed. |
| `gn/toolchain/BUILD.gn` | ✅ PASS | Toolchain patches for Tizen, MSVC vcvarsall, and Linux soname. Upstream adopted improvements, patches correctly dropped. |
| `gn/utils.gni` | ✅ PASS | WGL conditional compilation removed from WinRT targets. Upstream adopted platform incompatibility fix. |
| `include/core/SkFontMgr.h` | ✅ PASS | MakeDefault() compatibility shim no longer needed. m122 removed SkFontMgr::Factory; fork uses platform-specific singleton instead. |
| `include/core/SkTypeface.h` | ✅ PASS | RefDefault() declaration patch dropped. m120 removed typeface factories; C API stubs return nullptr per PR description. |
| `src/core/SkTypeface.cpp` | ✅ PASS | RefDefault() implementation dropped. Typeface factory approach replaced by font manager singleton in m122. |
| `src/gpu/ganesh/gl/glx/GrGLMakeGLXInterface.cpp` | ✅ PASS | GLX dynamic loading patch dropped. Upstream adopted dlopen/dlsym approach, patch no longer needed. |
| `src/gpu/ganesh/GrDirectContext.cpp` | ✅ PASS | Metal retain() fix dropped. m120/m122 moved to GrDirectContexts namespace, old patch no longer applies. |
| `src/ports/SkFontMgr_fontconfig.cpp` | ✅ PASS | Tizen maxId increase (16 to 256) dropped. Upstream likely adopted or code was refactored in m122. |
| `src/utils/win/SkWGL_win.cpp` | ✅ PASS | ARM64 WGL enablement patch dropped. Upstream removed the ARM64 exclusion in later milestones. |
| `tools/git-sync-deps` | ✅ PASS | Minor formatting and Emscripten SDK tweaks dropped. Maintenance changes absorbed by upstream. |

| File | Status | Summary |

| `DEPS` | ✅ PASS | Dependency pins updated with some entries commented out and others restored. Matches PR description of custom pin restoration. |
| `gn/BUILDCONFIG.gn` | ✅ PASS | SkiaSharp platform extensions maintained: static build, soname, SDK detection, multi-platform variables. Fork-specific build config. |
| `gn/core.gni` | ✅ PASS | C API binding sources (sk_*.h/.cpp) and gr_context support maintained in skia_core_sources. Required SkiaSharp C API layer. |
| `include/core/SkFont.h` | ✅ PASS | breakText() method overloads maintained. Content identical between patches, only line offsets differ from upstream changes. |
| `src/core/SkFont.cpp` | ✅ PASS | breakText() implementation maintained. Functionally identical 91-line method, only line numbers differ due to upstream shifts. |
| `src/core/SkTextBlob.cpp` | ✅ PASS | allocRunRSXform() signature updated: added const SkRect* bounds parameter. API change matching upstream m122 text blob handling. |
| `src/xps/SkXPSDevice.cpp` | ✅ PASS | WinRT and nanoserver platform guards added for thumbnail generation and typeface subsetting. Valid platform abstraction. |
| `third_party/freetype2/BUILD.gn` | ✅ PASS | Tizen platform support added: conditional cflags for system freetype2 include path. Legitimate platform-specific build addition. |
